THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARGER, CYNTHIA FRISON, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 331 OCTAVIA STREET #7, SF, CA 94102 $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-17-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO PAY $50 PER MONTH STARTING ON 8/1/94 AND CONTINUING UNTIL FULLY PAID. SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAILS.
